JURY TRIAL

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The cause came on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Defendant appearing in pro per, plaintiff represented by and through Michael Rossoff, Esq. Cause did not settle this day. Court ordered the matter off calendar. Trial date is confirmed.
